steps.title: Match the revealing role
steps.content: The passage says ephemeral objects can reveal shifts in norms, values, and concerns that traditional historical sources may miss. The blank needs a phrase showing that these objects serve as signs of cultural change.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A would make the objects substitutes. Choice B would make them guesses. Choice D would make them excuses or false reasons. The remaining choice means signs or indicators, matching the way the objects reveal change. The answer is C.
